name: lightscope-ce
description: A high-performance web analytics platform powered by ClickHouse.

scripts.ci: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run docker:up -d && node scripts/wait-for-ports.js && pnpm --filter lightscope-e2e run test
